word: G805 - ἀσφαλίζω - asphalízō - as-fal-id'-zo - Make fast

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀσφαλίζω

- Transliteration: Asphalizo

- Phonetic: as-fal-id'-zo

- Definition:

1. to make firm, to make secure (against harm)

2. to be made secure

- Origin: from G804

- TDNT entry: 09:26,9

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G804; to render secure: - make fast (sure).
